meaning: adj.无男子气概的,娇气的,怯懦的
examples: Your partner can feel the loss as acutely as you, but may feel that it is unmanly to cry.
At that time, pants were considered unmanly.
Chemically, I'm at the most unmanly point in my life.
Alas, like most wealthy drinkers, Australians are forsaking beer for wine and other unmanly tipples.
All this was very un-footballer-like and faintly unmanly.
